techcrunch.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
techcrunch.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

techcrunch.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
techcrunch.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

techcrunch.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
techcrunch.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

techcrunch.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
techcrunch.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

techcrunch.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
techcrunch.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

techcrunch.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
techcrunch.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

techcrunch.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
techcrunch.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

techcrunch.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role
techcrunch.summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.

techcrunch.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
techcrunch.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

techcrunch.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
techcrunch.summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.
